name: discord
description: Connect to Discord as a bot. Respond in server channels, DMs, and threads.

identity.identifierHelpText: The user's Discord snowflake ID (enable Developer Mode to copy)

replyGuidance: Discord supports markdown formatting: **bold**, *italic*, `code`, ```code blocks```, > quotes, and [links](url). Keep replies under 2000 characters. Use embeds sparingly. You can react to messages with emoji instead of (or in addition to) replying with text — a thumbs-up, heart, or contextual emoji reaction often feels more natural than a full text response for simple acknowledgements.
